name: testCreateAcquirerWithDuplicateNameShowsError
description: Verify error appears when creating an Acquirer with a duplicate name.
descriptionHtml: Verify error appears when creating an Acquirer with a duplicate name.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify error appears when creating an Acquirer with a duplicate name.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: Acquirer Error message is displayed
Verify: the 'Add acquirer' dialog is not closed
